name: Commander's Strike
desc: Forgo one attack. Ally uses reaction to attack + superiority die damage.

name: Disarming Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Target makes STR save or drops one held item.

name: Distracting Strike
desc: +superiority die damage. Next attack by another attacker has advantage.

name: Feinting Attack
desc: Bonus action. Advantage on next attack this turn + superiority die damage.

name: Goading Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Target makes WIS save or has disadvantage on attacks vs others.

name: Maneuvering Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Ally can move half speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Menacing Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Target makes WIS save or is frightened.

name: Parry
desc: Reaction: reduce melee damage by superiority die + DEX mod.

name: Precision Attack
desc: Add superiority die to attack roll (before or after rolling).

name: Pushing Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Large or smaller target makes STR save or is pushed 15 ft.

name: Rally
desc: Bonus action: ally gains temp HP equal to superiority die + CHA mod.

name: Riposte
desc: Reaction on miss: melee attack + superiority die damage.

name: Sweeping Attack
desc: On hit: another creature within 5 ft takes superiority die damage if original roll would hit.

name: Trip Attack
desc: +superiority die damage. Large or smaller target makes STR save or falls prone.
